nasb.text: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness,

esv.text: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness,

cnv.text: 但聖靈的果子是仁愛、喜樂、平安、忍耐、恩慈、良善、信實、

ccb.text: 但圣灵所结的果子是仁爱、喜乐、和平、忍耐、恩慈、良善、信实、

csbs.text: 然而，圣灵的果子是：爱心、喜乐、和平、忍耐、仁慈、良善、忠信、
